zh.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm是Erik Knudsen和Anne Mogensdatter的兒子，於大約1255年出生在丹麥。他和Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1330年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在丹麥奧德爾波格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm是Erik Knudsen和Anne Mogensdatter的儿子，于大约1255年出生在丹麦。他和Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1330年在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在丹麦奧德爾波格。

nameMeanings.name: Erikssen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Nils, Per, Alf, Algot, Alvar, Bjorn, Elof, Knut, Mats.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Erik, from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ). Compare Erickson , Ericsson , and Erikson .

variants.name: Erikson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Anders, Nils, Astrid, Berndt, Iver, Karsten, Lars, Lennart, Lief, Thor.  German Gerhart, Ernst.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Eriksson  . This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian, Danish, and North German cognate   Eriksen  . Compare   Erekson   and   Erickson  .

variants.name: Erickson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Thor, Nils, Lars, Sven, Lief, Anders, Lennart, Iver, Elof, Erland.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Ericsson and Eriksson , Norwegian, Danish, and North German Eriksen and Erichsen , or of any other Scandinavian or North German patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr, which is composed of ei ‘ever, always’ (or a shortened form of ein ‘one, only’) + rík ‘power’. Compare Ericksen , Ericson , and Erikson .
English (Lancashire): patronymic from the Middle English male personal name Eric (with the same etymology as 1 above) + son.

variants.name: Erekson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Eriksson or of any other Scandinavian patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ).

variants.name: Ericsson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Sven, Anders, Britt, Gunvor, Johan, Kerstin, Tor.
Swedish: variant of   Eriksson  . Compare   Erickson   and   Ericson  .

nameMeanings.name: Niels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm was born about 1255, in Denmark as the son of Erik Knudsen and Anne Mogensdatter. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. He died in 1330, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Sønderborg, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm est né environ 1255, à Danemark, fils d’Erik Knudsen et Anne Mogensdatter. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. Il est décédé en 1330, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Sønderborg, Danemark.

de.Rendsburg, Rendsburg, Rendsburg, Schlesw: Rendsburg, Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm wurde um 1255 in Dänemark, als Sohn von Erik Knudsen und Anne Mogensdatter geboren. Er hatte mit Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sonderburg, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm è nato il circa 1255 nel Danimarca come figlio di Erik Knudsen e Anne Mogensdatter. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. Morì nel 1330, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Sønderborg, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholmは約1255年にデンマークでErik KnudsenとAnne Mogensdatterの息子として生まれた。彼はEdel Pedersdatter Saltenseeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1330年に故郷で76歳で死去し，デンマークスoンデルボルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm(은)는 대략 1255년 덴마크에서 Erik Knudsen(와)과 Anne Mogensdatter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 스o더볼그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Dinamarca filho de Erik Knudsen e Anne Mogensdatter. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. Ele faleceu em 1330, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Sønderborg, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm родился около 1255 г. в местности Дания. Его родителей звали Erik Knudsen и Anne Mogensdatter. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. Он умер в 1330 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности сoндирборг, Дания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Edel Pedersdatter Saltensee. Murió en 1330, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Sønderborg, Dinamarca.
